title: Civil Engineers
description: Perform engineering duties in planning, designing, and overseeing construction and maintenance of building structures and facilities, such as roads, railroads, airports, bridges, harbors, channels, dams, irrigation projects, pipelines, power plants, and water and sewage systems.

tasks.text: Direct engineering activities, ensuring compliance with environmental, safety, or other governmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage and direct the construction, operations, or maintenance activities at project site.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect project sites to monitor progress and ensure conformance to design specifications and safety or sanitation standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute load and grade requirements, water flow rates, or material stress factors to determine design specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and design transportation or hydraulic systems or structures, using computer-assisted design or drawing tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical advice to industrial or managerial personnel regarding design, construction, program modifications, or structural repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze survey reports, maps, drawings, blueprints, aerial photography, or other topographical or geologic data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct or participate in surveying to lay out installations or establish reference points, grades, or elevations to guide construction.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate quantities and cost of materials, equipment, or labor to determine project feasibility.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or present public reports on topics such as bid proposals, deeds, environmental impact statements, or property and right-of-way descriptions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design energy-efficient or environmentally sound civil structures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test soils or materials to determine the adequacy and strength of foundations, concrete, asphalt, or steel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify environmental risks and develop risk management strategies for civil engineering projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct studies of traffic patterns or environmental conditions to identify engineering problems and assess potential project impact.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or implement engineering solutions to clean up industrial accidents or other contaminated sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or engineer systems to efficiently dispose of chemical, biological, or other toxic wastes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
